song_name: Maroon 5 - Memories - The Vowels They Orbit - Selos - Andy Grammer - Dont Give Up On Me
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Memories/Selos/Don't Give Up on Me (Mashup)


[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
Here's to the ones that we got[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]F#m[/ch]
Cheers to the wish you were here, but you're not[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause the drinks bring back all the memories of everything we've been through[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
Toast to the ones here today[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]F#m[/ch]
Toast to the ones that we lost on the way[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
'Cause the drinks bring back all the memories[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]          N.C.
And the memories bring back memories, bring back you...[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
There's a time that I remember, when I did not know no pain[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
When I believed in forever, and everything would stay the same[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]
Now my heart feel like December, when somebody say your name[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause I can't reach out to call you, but I know I will one day, ay[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]
   Everybody hurts sometimes, everybody hurts someday, ay-ay[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]A[/ch]
   Everything will be alright, go and raise a glass and say, hey[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
Here's to the ones that we got[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]F#m[/ch]
Cheers to the wish you were here, but you're not[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause the drinks bring back all the memories of everything we've been through[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
Toast to ones here today[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]F#m[/ch]
Toast to the ones that we lost on the way[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
'Cause the drinks bring back all the memories[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]          N.C.
And the memories bring back memories, bring back you...[/tab]


[Intro]
[ch]Amaj7[/ch] [ch]Emaj7[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]      [ch]Amaj7[/ch]     [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Binabaliw ako ng selos[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Amaj7[/ch] [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Hinde ko man aminin[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Amaj7[/ch]        [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Kung ano anong iniisip[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Amaj7[/ch]      [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Nagbibintang ng alanganin[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Amaj7[/ch]        [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Magpapalipas ako ng oras[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Amaj7[/ch]              [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Para lang magtanggal ng galit at inis[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Amaj7[/ch]         [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Ipapaanod na ba sa alak?[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#m[/ch]                      [ch]B[/ch]
Baka sakaling magpakita ang ngiti[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]
Selos selos[/tab]
[tab][ch]Emaj7[/ch]
selos selos[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amaj7[/ch]         [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Selos selosa[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Amaj7[/ch]        [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Magpapalipas ako ng oras[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Amaj7[/ch]              [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Para lang magtanggal ng galit at inis[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Amaj7[/ch]         [ch]Emaj7[/ch]
Ipapaanod na ba sa alak?[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#m[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Baka sakaling magpakita ang ngiti[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]
There's a time that I remember when I never felt so lost[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
When I felt like all of the hatred, was too powerful to stop (Ooh yeah)[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
Now my heart feel like an ember, and it's lighting up the dark[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
I'll carry these torches for you, and you know I never drop, yeah[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]
   Everybody hurts sometimes, everybody hurts someday, ay-ay[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
   Everything gon' be alright, go and raise a glass and say, hey[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]A[/ch]
Here's to the ones that we got (oh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]F#m[/ch]
Cheers to the wish you were here, but you're not[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause the drinks bring back all the memories of everything we've been through (no no)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
Toast to ones here today[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                        [ch]F#m[/ch]
Toast to the ones that we lost on the way[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
'Cause the drinks bring back all the memories (ay)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]          N.C.
And the memories bring back memories, bring back you...[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
I will fight, I will fight for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                      [ch]C[/ch]
I always do until my heart is black and blue[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
And I will stay, I will stay with you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
We'll make it to the other side like lovers do[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
I'll reach my hands out in the dark and[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Wait for yours to interlock[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
I'll wait for you, I'll wait for you[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I'm not givin' up[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]D[/ch]
I'm not givin' up, givin' up, no, not yet (Not yet)[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Em[/ch]
Even when I'm down on my last breath (Last breath)[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]C[/ch]
Even when they say there's nothin' left (Nothin' left)[/tab]

So don't give up on
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I'm not givin' up[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]D[/ch]
I'm not givin' up, givin' up, no, not me (Not me)[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
Even when nobody else believes (Believes)[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]
I'm not goin' down that easily[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]
So don't give up on me[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
And I will hold, I'll hold onto you[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]
No matter what this world will throw[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]
It won't shake me loose[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
I'll reach my hands out in the dark and[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Wait for yours to interlock[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
I'll wait for you, I'll wait for you[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
'Cause I'm not givin' up[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]D[/ch]
I'm not givin' up, givin' up, no, not yet (Not yet)[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
Even when I'm down on my last breath (Last breath)[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]C[/ch]
Even when they say there's nothin' left (Nothin' left)[/tab]

So don't give up on
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I'm not givin' up[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]D[/ch]
I'm not givin' up, givin' up, no, not me (Not me)[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
Even when nobody else believes (Believes)[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C[/ch]
I'm not goin' down that easily[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]
So don't give up on me[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Whoa, whoa[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Whoa, whoa[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Yeah yeah yeah yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Yeah yeah yeah[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
I will fight, I will fight for you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                             [ch]C[/ch]
